task_completion.description: Bonsai/BlenderBIM is open with the FZK-Haus model loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender interface is visible, showing a 3D view of a residential building (FZK-Haus) and Bonsai/BlenderBIM panels.

task_completion.description: The Georeferencing or Site properties panel is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Scene Properties or Object Properties panel in Blender shows the Bonsai/BlenderBIM Georeferencing, Site, or Spatial coordinates section.

task_completion.description: The CRS EPSG code is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '25832' is visible in the CRS or EPSG field within the georeferencing settings.

task_completion.description: The Easting, Northing, Height, and True North rotation are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values Easting: 456568.0, Northing: 5429834.0, Height: 115.0, and True North (or rotation): 0 are visible in the respective coordinate fields.

task_completion.description: The georeferenced model is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Blender save/export dialog or file manager showing the file being saved as 'fzk_georeferenced.ifc' in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Bonsai/BlenderBIM GUI to georeference the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with Blender's georeferencing input fields and save dialogs, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually edit the IFC file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are shown editing the raw IFC file to insert coordinates.

integrity.description: The file was saved using Blender's export or save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender file browser or export dialog is used to save the IFC file, rather than a terminal copy/move command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected CRS EPSG code is 25832. The expected Easting is 456568.0, Northing is 5429834.0, Height is 115.0, and True North rotation is 0 degrees. The expected output file path is /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_georeferenced.ifc.
